---
title: "Python basics"
format: html
---


## Setup

Everything needs to be installed before getting to this stage.
The examples are using a conda env.

### pandas

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
```

### Polars

```{python}
import polars as pl
```

### DuckDB
```{python}
import duckdb
```

### Arrow

```{python}
import pyarrow as pa
```

## Creating

### pandas

### Polars

TODO

### DuckDB

TODO

### Arrow

TODO


## Importing data

### pandas

### Polars

TODO

### DuckDB

TODO

### Arrow

TODO


## Subsetting

### pandas

### Polars

TODO

### DuckDB

TODO

### Arrow

TODO


## Sorting

### pandas

### Polars

TODO

### DuckDB

TODO

### Arrow

TODO


## Modifying

### pandas

### Polars

TODO

### DuckDB

TODO

### Arrow

TODO
